ddls:
CREATE TABLE "instruments" (
  "instrument_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each instrument */,
  "make" TEXT /* Manufacturer of the instrument */,
  "model_id" INTEGER /* Model ID of the instrument */,
  "serial_number" TEXT /* Serial number of the instrument */,
  "number" INTEGER /* Unique number assigned to the instrument */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Notes or comments about the instrument */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the instrument (e.g., active, inactive, maintenance) */,
  "purchase_date" TEXT /* Date the instrument was purchased */,
  "warranty_expiration_date" TEXT /* Date the instrument's warranty expires */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("instrument_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_instruments_model_id FOREIGN KEY ("model_id") REFERENCES instrument_models ("model_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "instrument_models" (
  "model_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each instrument model */,
  "model_name" TEXT /* Name of the instrument model */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the instrument model */,
  "manual_url" TEXT /* URL to the instrument model manual */,
  "technical_specifications_url" TEXT /* URL to the instrument model technical specifications */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("model_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "customers" (
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each customer */,
  "customer_name" TEXT /* Name of the customer */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email of the customer */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the customer */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the customer */,
  "organization" TEXT /* Organization name of the customer */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("customer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "instrument_assignments" (
  "assignment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each assignment */,
  "instrument_id" INTEGER /* ID of the instrument being assigned */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the customer the instrument is assigned to */,
  "assignment_date" TEXT /* Date the instrument was assigned */,
  "assignment_type" TEXT /* Type of assignment (e.g., rental, sale) */,
  "return_date" TEXT /* Date the instrument was returned (if applicable) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("assignment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_instrument_assignments_instrument_id FOREIGN KEY ("instrument_id") REFERENCES instruments ("instrument_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_instrument_assignments_customer_id FOREIGN KEY ("customer_id") REFERENCES customers ("customer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "maintenance_history" (
  "maintenance_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each maintenance record */,
  "instrument_id" INTEGER /* ID of the instrument being maintained */,
  "maintenance_date" TEXT /* Date the maintenance was performed */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the maintenance performed */,
  "maintenance_type" TEXT /* Type of maintenance (e.g., routine, repair) */,
  "maintenance_status" TEXT /* Status of the maintenance (e.g., completed, pending) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("maintenance_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_maintenance_history_instrument_id FOREIGN KEY ("instrument_id") REFERENCES instruments ("instrument_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "instrument_configurations" (
  "configuration_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each configuration */,
  "instrument_id" INTEGER /* ID of the instrument being configured */,
  "configuration_date" TEXT /* Date the configuration was performed */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the configuration */,
  "configuration_type" TEXT /* Type of configuration (e.g., hardware, software) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("configuration_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_instrument_configurations_instrument_id FOREIGN KEY ("instrument_id") REFERENCES instruments ("instrument_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "components" (
  "component_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each component */,
  "component_name" TEXT /* Name of the component */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the component */,
  "component_type" TEXT /* Type of component (e.g., sensor, cable) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("component_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "instrument_components" (
  "instrument_component_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each instrument-component relationship */,
  "instrument_id" INTEGER /* ID of the instrument */,
  "component_id" INTEGER /* ID of the component used in the instrument */,
  "quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity of the component used in the instrument */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("instrument_component_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_instrument_components_component_id FOREIGN KEY ("component_id") REFERENCES components ("component_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_instrument_components_instrument_id FOREIGN KEY ("instrument_id") REFERENCES instruments ("instrument_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., customer, maintenance personnel, admin) */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "instrument_id" INTEGER /* ID of the instrument being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the instrument */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the instrument was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, edit) */,
  "access_status" TEXT /* Status of the access (e.g., successful, failed) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_instrument_id FOREIGN KEY ("instrument_id") REFERENCES instruments ("instrument_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "calibration_data" (
  "calibration_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each calibration record */,
  "instrument_id" INTEGER /* ID of the instrument being calibrated */,
  "calibration_date" TEXT /* Date the calibration was performed */,
  "calibration_value" REAL /* Calibration value */,
  "calibration_type" TEXT /* Type of calibration (e.g., initial, routine) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("calibration_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_calibration_data_instrument_id FOREIGN KEY ("instrument_id") REFERENCES instruments ("instrument_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "role_permissions" (
  "role_permission_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role permission */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* ID of the role */,
  "instrument_id" INTEGER /* ID of the instrument */,
  "permission" TEXT /* Permission (e.g., view, edit) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_permission_id")
)
